create_sketch.doc:
Creates a new sketch on a plane or face.

Arguments:
    name (str): Mandatory name for the new sketch.
    plane_name (str): "XY", "XZ", "YZ", or construction plane name.
    body_name (str): Optional. Name of the body if sketching on a face.
    face_index (int): Optional. Index of the face on the body.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Mandatory name for the new sketch.

parameters.name: body_name
parameters.description: Optional. Name of the body if sketching on a face.

parameters.name: face_index
parameters.description: Optional. Index of the face on the body.

create_sketch_on_plane.doc: Compatibility wrapper for explicit plane-name sketch creation.

add_polygon.doc: Adds a regular polygon. Units: cm.

apply_constraint.doc:
Applies a geometric constraint.

Types: coincident, collinear, concentric, midpoint, parallel, perpendicular, 
       horizontal, vertical, tangent, equal.

create_extrude.doc:
Extrudes a sketch profile.

Arguments:
    name (str): Mandatory name for the new feature.
    distance (float): Extrusion depth in cm.
    operation (str): new_body, join, cut, intersect.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Mandatory name for the new feature.

create_hole.doc: Creates a circular hole. Units: cm.

create_fillet.doc: Fillets all edges of a body. Units: cm.

create_chamfer.doc: Chamfers all edges of a body. Units: cm.

scale_body.doc: Uniformly scales a body from the component origin.

create_thread.doc: Adds a thread to a cylindrical face of a body.

move_body.doc: Translates a body by (dx, dy, dz) in cm.

measure_interference.doc: Checks for interference between a list of bodies.

create_rib.doc: Creates a rib feature from a sketch profile.

create_web.doc: Creates a web feature from a sketch profile.

create_emboss.doc: Creates an emboss or deboss feature.

import_mesh.doc: Imports an STL or OBJ mesh file into the active design.

convert_mesh_to_solid.doc:
Converts a mesh body to a solid (BRep) body using Fusion's native conversion tool.

Arguments:
    body_name (str): The name of the mesh body to convert.
    method (str): 'faceted' (each triangle becomes a face) or 'prismatic' (attempts to merge planar/cylindrical faces). Prismatic is best for mechanical parts.

parameters.name: body_name
parameters.description: The name of the mesh body to convert.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: 'faceted' (each triangle becomes a face) or 'prismatic' (attempts to merge planar/cylindrical faces). Prismatic is best for mechanical parts.

list_designs.doc:
Lists designs in a project and folder.

Args:
    project_name: Name of the project.
    folder_path: Optional path to a subfolder (e.g. "Mechanical/Parts").

open_design.doc:
Opens an existing design.

Args:
    project_name: Name of the project.
    name: Name of the design file.
    folder_path: Optional path to a subfolder.

close_document.doc:
Closes the active document.
save (bool): True to save changes, False (default) to discard without saving.

close_all_documents.doc:
Closes all open documents.
save (bool): True to save changes, False (default) to discard without saving.

get_object_hierarchy.doc:
Returns the full design object hierarchy showing name and type of every object.

Recursively traverses the component tree starting from the root component,
collecting bodies, sketches, joints, construction planes/axes/points, and
features for each component.  Sub-components are listed as children via
their occurrences.

_get_command_metadata.doc: Internal command to export all registered command metadata (signatures, docstrings).

get_addin_logs.doc: Internal command to read the Add-in's persistent log file.

reload_addin.doc:
Creates a temporary script to stop and restart this Add-in.
This safely allows the Add-in to reload its own code after an update.

get_system_info.doc: Internal command to get system information (OS, temp dir).
